violations.text: The pizza prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
Hot water for 3 bay sink was not reaching temperature of 110F. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
